comment.text: This key displays the title for a wallet info section within a "Top Up to AI" transfer block in the Portal Settings. It shows the AI service balance and includes the organization's name dynamically inserted into the text (e.g., "[Organization Name] AI"). This appears in a dialog or modal related to topping up funds for AI services.

usage.context:
<div className={modalStyles.transferBlock}>
 <Text fontWeight="600">{t("Payments:TopUpTo")}</Text>
 
 <WalletInfo
 title={t("Services:OrganizationAI", {
 organizationName: logoText,
 })}
 balance={aiServiceBalanceValue}
 iconUrl={AiAgents}
 />
